overview: MD for Men diagnoses and treats male health conditions including erectile dysfunction, low testosterone, vasectomy, Peyronie's disease, benign prostatic hyperplasia, and male fertility issues. The clinic offers multiple treatment and delivery options including penile ultrasound diagnosis, in-office procedures, and home-based therapies.
highlights: No-needle no-scalpel vasectomy with single office visit
Home injection and pellet options for testosterone delivery
targetAudience: Men seeking treatment for sexual health, hormonal balance, and fertility concerns.
